title: Psychology Mission and Vision
content:
Psychology Mission and Vision

Mission

Our psychology department strives to develop knowledge and skills that will allow students to engage in both science and practice of psychology. To accomplish this mission, our department provides in-class and extracurricular programs promoting students’ critical thinking; intellectual competence on human behavior, emotions, and thoughts; and ability to specialize in different disciplines of psychology.

Vision

The vision of our psychology department is to train our students as partners in advancing scientific knowledge and to develop innovative solutions in psychological assistance services based on scientific and contemporary values both locally and globally. As the department of psychology, we aim to train students who have a well-developed capability for synthesizing information, who are strong critical thinkers, and who respect and enhance diversity of individuals and cultures.
